scope_statement: All work captured here was localized to dom0 because state outside dom0 was treated as untrusted.
summary: Localized the homeostasis/ACM analysis workflow in dom0, built terminology and graph-derived analysis artifacts, and established a readable closure surface for root-level concept clusters.
tasks: Created a localized PLAN packet for root-level homeostasis versus ACM analysis under /home/_404/src/dom0/PLAN.
Produced a raw glossary and spaCy-derived token, lemma, KWIC, and collocation artifacts under /home/_404/src/dom0.
Normalized and deduplicated the glossary without semantic alteration, then enriched the working copy with spec-driven and control-theory terminology.
Extracted PLAN terminology, diffed it against the enriched glossary, derived seeds, and built plan-enrichment findings.
Derived seed lexical fields, an indexed term relationship graph, second-degree and third-degree reachability artifacts, and closure-cycle summaries under /home/_404/src/dom0/analysis/terminology.
Added a local repo ignore boundary for transient cloud/cache/error surfaces.

observed_commit_refs_before_amend.subject: Add terminology and closure analysis artifacts
